Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Man, I wonder why Sanada-san was acting so weird. Somethin' about the date?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I was so focused on the operation that I didn't realize it...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Today is the anniversary of the day Amada's mother was killed![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Yamagishi, I need you to locate Aragaki and Amada immediately.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}There's a good chance they'll be together. Akihiko must have already realized it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Public records say that Amada's mother was killed in an accident...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}...But in truth, we were the ones responsible for her death.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}It happened {f 0 1 33}two years ago, when we were hunting down a Shadow{f 0 1 27} that appeared in the city...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Aragaki had only just awakened his Persona, and he lost control of it for a moment.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}We'd been so focused on the Shadow, we hadn't accounted for any civilians in the area.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 52 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I should've considered this when Amada volunteered to join us. It's possible that he...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}I've found them! They're at Tatsumi Port Island![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 6 3 52 50 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}They're together, and I'm picking up someone else, too...[n]{f 1 1}
